allow: Bash(node -e "try { const p = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const deps = Object.keys\(p.packages[''].dependencies || {}\); const devDeps = Object.keys\(p.packages[''].devDependencies || {}\); console.log\('DEPS:', deps.join\(', '\)\); console.log\('DEVDEPS:', devDeps.join\(', '\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(e.message\); }")
